content:
Sagittarius November 2026 Horoscope and Crystal of the Month

Energy Theme Rest the depths, claim the partnership
Key Dates Venus + Mercury station direct Nov 13 / New Moon Nov 8 (Scorpio, 12th house) / Mars conjunct Jupiter Nov 16 (Leo, your 9th) / Sun enters Sagittarius Nov 22 / Gemini Beaver Full Moon Nov 24 (7th house — your opposite sign)
Love Gemini Beaver Full Moon in your 7th house — your opposite sign — is one of 2026’s biggest partnership moments
Career Mars conjunct Jupiter in your 9th house is a publishing, study, and travel peak
Crystal of the Month Carnelian
Lucky Colors Warm orange, sunset amber, deep plum
Lucky Number 7
Affirmation I rest the depths October surfaced; I claim the partnership my truth has sharpened.

This Month’s Energy

Sagittarius, November 2026 rests the depths and claims the partnership. Venus and Mercury both station direct on November 13, releasing October’s retrograde season. The New Moon in Scorpio on November 8 falls in your 12th house of rest, closure, dreams, and the unconscious — a quiet fresh start behind the scenes. Then November 16 brings Mars conjunct Jupiter at 25°53′ Leo, your 9th house of belief, study, travel, and meaning — and Jupiter is your ruling planet, so this conjunction lands with extra weight. The Sun enters Sagittarius on November 22 — your season begins. November 24 brings the Beaver Full Moon in Gemini, your 7th house of partnership and marriage — your opposite sign’s Full Moon. November’s pattern: rest the depths early, claim the partnership late.

Key Dates for Sagittarius in November 2026

Date Transit Meaning for Sagittarius Do / Avoid
Nov 8 New Moon in Scorpio 12th house — fresh start in rest, closure, dreams, the unconscious; complete what’s been waiting Do: rest, journal, attend to dreams, complete the unfinished
Avoid: forcing public action when the depths ask for rest
Nov 13 Venus + Mercury station direct Station day — the retrograde season ends; clarity returns to closure, communication, and partnership matters Do: move forward on what’s been waiting, send the message, sign the agreement
Avoid: rushing decisions in the 3 days around the station
Nov 16 Mars conjunct Jupiter at 25°53′ Leo (Jupiter is your ruler) 9th house — belief, study, travel, publishing, meaning peak; a once-every-two-years amplification of your worldview and Jupiter-ruled confidence Do: publish the work, commit to the course, take the trip, claim the belief
Avoid: holding onto a worldview you’ve outgrown
Nov 22 Sun enters Sagittarius (your 1st house) Birthday season begins; your annual personal restart Do: set the tone for the new year, declare the next chapter, claim the self
Avoid: waiting for perfect to begin
Nov 24 Beaver Full Moon in Gemini (your 7th house — opposite sign) 7th house — climax around partnership, marriage, contracts; your opposite sign’s Full Moon is the year’s loudest relationship turning point Do: claim the partnership, mend the significant tie, sign the contract
Avoid: hiding from a relationship decision
Early Nov Mars moves through Leo (your 9th) Belief, study, travel stay active; the run-up to Nov 16 builds the meaning momentum Do: commit to the course, refine the worldview, plan the trip
Avoid: postponing the bigger picture

Career & Money

For Sagittarius, November’s career story peaks at Mars conjunct Jupiter in your 9th house. The November 16 conjunction is a once-every-two-years amplification of publishing, teaching, study, travel, and meaning — and Jupiter is your ruling planet. Publish the work; commit to the course; take the trip.

The Scorpio New Moon on November 8 (your 12th house) favors behind-the-scenes research and completion. The Sun entering your sign on November 22 amps your visibility. The Gemini Beaver Full Moon on November 24 (your 7th house) brings a partnership-led career matter to a climax. Crystals for wealth can support the push; the practical move is rest the depths, claim the partnership.

Love & Relationships

The Gemini Beaver Full Moon on November 24 falls in your 7th house of partnership and marriage — and Gemini is your opposite sign, so this Full Moon lands directly on your relationship axis. It’s one of 2026’s loudest partnership turning points.

Venus stationing direct on November 13 releases the closure and unconscious-bond review of October. Mars conjunct Jupiter in your 9th house on November 16 amps belief-rooted love — a worldview difference or teaching tie may surface. The Sun entering your sign on November 22 amps personal confidence. Crystals for love can support the climax; the deeper practice is resting the depths so the partnership can meet the truer self.

Health & Wellness

November’s wellness story emphasizes the hips, liver, and thighs. The Scorpio New Moon on November 8 (your 12th house) is the wellness reset — sleep, dream work, and behind-the-scenes restoration matter. The Sun entering your sign on November 22 brings vitality.

Carnelian, your crystal of the month, is traditionally associated with vitality, courage, grounded creativity, and the sacral flow — a useful symbolic companion for a Jupiter-ruled fire sign at a Mars-Jupiter peak. Sagittarius often carries tension in the hips, liver, and thighs; gentle hip-opening yoga, warm food, and long walks are especially helpful. This is lifestyle guidance, not medical advice; persistent concerns belong with a clinician.

Crystal of the Month: Carnelian

Why Carnelian fits Sagittarius this month. You are Jupiter-ruled — your reflex is expansion, the horizon, the next adventure. November amplifies that to a Mars-Jupiter peak in your 9th house of belief. Carnelian — with its warm orange-red — is traditionally tied to vitality, courage, grounded creativity, and the sacral fire that fuels the journey. Where Citrine would amplify and Selenite would clarify, Carnelian ignites. Perfect for the 12th house Scorpio New Moon (rest the depths) and the 7th house Gemini Full Moon (claim the partnership).

How to use it during November 2026. Place Carnelian at your sacral or on your travel altar on November 8 (the Scorpio New Moon). Carry it during the Mars-Jupiter peak in your 9th house around November 16.

Best date to use it: November 16, the Mars conjunct Jupiter in your 9th house — hold Carnelian at your sacral for 5 minutes at the conjunction’s exact hour, naming the belief you’re publishing.

Read more: Carnelian Meaning and Best Crystals for Sagittarius.

Monthly Crystal Ritual for Sagittarius — November 2026

When: November 16, the Mars conjunct Jupiter in your 9th house.
Crystal: Carnelian.
Intention: Rest the depths; claim the belief the journey has sharpened.

  1. Cleanse Carnelian under cool running water for 30 seconds on the morning of November 8 (the Scorpio New Moon). Let it sit at your sacral or on your travel altar through November 8.
  2. Set the intention between the New Moon and the Mars-Jupiter peak (November 8–16): write down three depths October surfaced — and the belief you’re ready to publish at November 16.
  3. Act at the Mars conjunct Jupiter on November 16: publish the work, commit to the course, claim the belief. Carnelian at your sacral during the act.
  4. Reflect at the Sagittarius New Moon in December 2026 (your 1st house): how has the belief matured into the new year? Hold Carnelian during the review.

Shop Sagittarius Crystals for November 2026

Want to build your monthly crystal toolkit? Explore the full Sagittarius crystal guide for stones connected with courage, vitality, belief, and the bigger picture — including the Carnelian that ignites the Jupiter fire at a Mars-Jupiter peak. Every stone is genuine, ethically sourced, and real — not dyed, not glass.

Frequently Asked Questions — Sagittarius November 2026

Is November 2026 a good month for Sagittarius?

It’s a rest-and-claim month — and your season begins. The Scorpio New Moon on November 8 (your 12th house) is rest and closure. Venus and Mercury station direct on November 13. The Mars conjunct Jupiter on November 16 (your 9th house, Jupiter your ruler) is a belief and publishing peak. The Sun enters your sign on November 22. The Gemini Full Moon on November 24 (your 7th house) is a partnership climax.

How will the Mars conjunct Jupiter on November 16 affect Sagittarius?

Jupiter is your ruling planet — its conjunction with Mars in your 9th house of belief, study, travel, and meaning is a once-every-two-years amplification. Publish the work; commit to the course; take the trip; claim the worldview.

What does the Gemini Beaver Full Moon on November 24 mean for Sagittarius?

It falls in your 7th house of partnership and marriage — Gemini is your opposite sign, so this Full Moon lands directly on your relationship axis. A long-building significant bond reaches a turning point. Claim the partnership; mend the significant tie.

What is the best crystal for Sagittarius in November 2026?

Carnelian — it ignites the Jupiter fire at a Mars-Jupiter peak, exactly what a 12th house Scorpio New Moon (rest the depths) plus a 7th house Gemini Full Moon (claim the partnership) demand. See the full Sagittarius crystal guide →

Why does the Sun entering my sign on November 22 matter for Sagittarius?

The Sun’s entry into Sagittarius on November 22 opens your birthday season — your annual personal restart. It falls two days before the Gemini Full Moon in your 7th house, amping the partnership climax with personal confidence.
